pi_items.verified_value: Formula is mathematically correct for calculating percentage change from early to recent period
pi_items.source: Task description explicitly specifies this formula with proper null handling for division by zero

pi_items.metadata_value: Four categories: expanding, new_invasion, established, no_recent_activity
pi_items.verified_value: Categories and logic verified: (1) expanding: recent > early AND early > 0; (2) new_invasion: early == 0 AND recent > 0; (3) established: recent <= early AND early > 0 AND recent > 0; (4) no_recent_activity: recent == 0 AND early > 0
pi_items.source: Task description provides complete logic definition for all four status categories

pi_items.verified_value: Three columns required: invasion_status (categorical), state_count (integer count of states in each status), total_occurrences_recent (sum of recent period occurrences)
pi_items.source: Task description: 'Also export /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/invasion_summary.csv with columns: invasion_status, state_count, total_occurrences_recent'

pi_items.verified_value: Temporal gap is intentional and well-defined in task specification
pi_items.source: Task description explicitly defines two periods: '2005–2012' vs '2016–2023' with implied gap of 4 years

privileged_info_summary: The task analyzes the spatial-temporal spread of Harmonia axyridis (Asian ladybird) across the US by comparing occurrence records from GBIF (authentic public biodiversity data) for two periods: 2005-2012 (early invasion phase, 1,393 US records) and 2016-2023 (recent expansion, 97,919 US records). GBIF data includes year, coordinates, and state information for 173,436 total US occurrences. US state boundaries come from Natural Earth's 50m admin-1 dataset, which provides 48+ contiguous states with name and postal fields. The task requires computing percentage change in occurrence counts per state (using the formula 100*(recent-early)/early with null handling) and classifying invasion status into four categories (expanding, new_invasion, established, no_recent_activity) based on temporal dynamics. Output is a GeoJSON FeatureCollection with these derived fields plus a summary CSV. CRITICAL ISSUE DETECTED: The setup script uses incorrect GBIF taxonKey 1045608 (which refers to Ennearthron unicolor, a different beetle entirely and returns 0 US records), when the correct taxonKey for Harmonia axyridis is 4989904 (which provides 173,436 US records). This is a fundamental data pipeline error that would cause task failure with the current setup script.
